name: NoiseSchedule
description: Parameterized β/α noise schedule (linear or cosine). Outputs α_t and σ_t for a given diffusion step.
code:
_ns{{_id}}_t = int({{step}})
if '{{schedule_type}}' == 'cosine':
    _ns{{_id}}_s = 0.008
    _ns{{_id}}_i = np.arange({{num_steps}} + 1, dtype=np.float32)
    _ns{{_id}}_f = np.cos((_ns{{_id}}_i / {{num_steps}} + _ns{{_id}}_s) / (1 + _ns{{_id}}_s) * np.pi / 2) ** 2
    _ns{{_id}}_acp = _ns{{_id}}_f / _ns{{_id}}_f[0]
else:
    _ns{{_id}}_betas = np.linspace({{beta_start}}, {{beta_end}}, {{num_steps}}, dtype=np.float32)
    _ns{{_id}}_acp = np.cumprod(1.0 - _ns{{_id}}_betas)
    _ns{{_id}}_acp = np.concatenate([[1.0], _ns{{_id}}_acp])
{{alpha_t}} = np.array(_ns{{_id}}_acp[_ns{{_id}}_t], dtype=np.float32)
{{sigma_t}} = np.sqrt(np.maximum(1.0 - _ns{{_id}}_acp[_ns{{_id}}_t], 0.0)).astype(np.float32)
